summary: Add a docstring for sound_latent_frames_for_sequence_parallel clarifying that video_shape is in VAE-latent space, _pad_to_patch_size further patches it, and padded frames are real diffusion tokens causing SP output divergence.
Update the inline comment to explicitly state that num_vision_items accounts for transfer-control vision items to avoid confusion.
Add a comment noting sp_num_vision_items defaults to 1 because sound+transfer is rejected at the pipeline level.
Assert the concrete padded value in addition to the divisibility check to guard against accidental changes to the padding formula.
